name: Cube
description: Isometric tumbling cubes built from three lit faces, re-shading face by face on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 52%, 96% 28%, 96% 72%, 50% 96%); clip-path: polygon(50% 52%, 96% 28%, 96% 72%, 50% 96%); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 4%, 96% 28%, 50% 52%, 4% 28%); clip-path: polygon(50% 4%, 96% 28%, 50% 52%, 4% 28%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(4% 28%, 50% 52%, 50% 96%, 4% 72%); clip-path: polygon(4% 28%, 50% 52%, 50% 96%, 4% 72%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
